name: FORWARD AIR CORP
business: Forward Air Corporation is an asset-light provider of transportation services including ground transportation, air and ocean forwarding, intermodal drayage, and contract logistics. It serves freight intermediaries, airlines, and corporate customers across various sectors. The company operates through three segments: Expedited Freight, Omni Logistics, and Intermodal.
sellsTo: airlines (integrated air cargo, passenger and cargo)

exposures.sentence: We provide ground transportation, air and ocean forwarding, intermodal drayage services and contract logistics across North and South America, Europe and Asia.

Omni provides business-to-business (B2B) solutions to prominent United States-based customers across a variety of attractive end markets, including the technology, retail, media, logistics, life sciences and e-commerce sectors.
We maintain a robust Information Security program designed to protect our network, systems, and data from cybersecurity threats.

catalysts.event: Initiation of comprehensive review of strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, the Board of Directors (the Board) announced that it had initiated a comprehensive review of strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value.
